title: rubus silesiacus var. humiliserratus
intro: Rubus silesiacus var. humiliserratus, also known as the dwarf Himalayan raspberry, is a variety of bramble that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus silesiacus var. humiliserratus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
